summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Faculty CRM P2 Loyalty System feature. All backend APIs (21/21 tests) and frontend UI components working correctly. Features tested: sequence CRUD, enrollment management, message processing, auto-enrollment on purchase, duplicate prevention.

minor.issue: When multiple active sequences exist for same product, find_one picks first match (any sequence). This is expected behavior but could be documented.

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - admin credentials work
GET /api/loyalty/sequences - returns list of sequences
POST /api/loyalty/sequences - create sequence with product and messages
Verify created sequence appears in list
DELETE /api/loyalty/sequences/{id} - delete sequence
GET /api/loyalty/enrollments - returns enrollments with progress data
POST /api/loyalty/enroll?lead_id=X&sequence_id=Y - enroll lead in sequence
Verify enrollment includes lead_name, lead_whatsapp, sequence_name, messages array
POST /api/loyalty/enroll duplicate - returns 400 (duplicate prevention works)
DELETE /api/loyalty/enrollments/{id} - delete enrollment
POST /api/loyalty/process - processes pending messages (day 0 messages marked enviado)
Verify day 0 message status=enviado, day 30 message status=pendiente
POST /api/leads/{lead_id}/purchase - auto-enrolls in active loyalty sequence
Second purchase does not create duplicate enrollment
POST /api/loyalty/enroll with non-existent lead returns 404
DELETE /api/loyalty/enrollments/{fake_id} returns 404
Sequences endpoint requires auth (401)
Enrollments endpoint requires auth (401)
Process endpoint requires auth (401)
Frontend: Loyalty page loads with data-testid='loyalty-page'
Frontend: Stats cards show Secuencias, Inscritos Activos, Msgs Pendientes, Msgs Enviados
Frontend: Sequences tab shows sequences with messages and ON/OFF status
Frontend: Enrollments tab shows table with Lead, WhatsApp, Secuencia, Progreso, Estado, Acciones
Frontend: Progress bars display correctly (e.g., 0/1, 0/3)
Frontend: 'Nueva Secuencia' button opens dialog with product selector and message config
Frontend: 'Inscribir Lead' button opens dialog with lead and sequence dropdowns
Frontend: 'Procesar Pendientes' button works and shows toast notification
critical_code_review_comments: Auto-enrollment uses find_one which picks first matching active sequence for a product. Consider if specific sequence selection is needed.
Loyalty message delivery is MOCKED (logs to console, marks as 'enviado' in DB, no actual WhatsApp send)
seed_data_creation: Test created sequences and enrollments with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 Loyalty System fully implemented. Sequences support up to 24 messages with day-based scheduling. Enrollments track message progress (pendiente/enviado). Auto-enrollment happens on purchase when active sequence exists for product. Message delivery is MOCKED - marks as sent but doesn't actually send WhatsApp messages.

mocked_apis_list: Loyalty message sending is simulated/logged, not sent via WhatsApp
